# Presences

> AI-powered smart school automation platform for attendance, security, timetables, and parent communication.

Presences helps schools automate daily operations with face-recognition attendance, gate monitoring, parent updates, and analytics.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Presences platform and automation capabilities.
- [Features](/features): Detailed modules for attendance, timetable, security, and communication.
- [Parent Portal](/parent): Parent-facing portal for attendance status and notifications.
- [Contact](/contact): Support and onboarding contact information.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Account sign-in for staff and administrators.
- [Signup](/signup): Create a new account for school setup.
